reference: Hello. I am a thirty-three-year-old male. I am experiencing discomfort in the perineum and anus, especially when sitting down. Ultrasounds of the prostate, kidney, and bladder were negative. Culture tests on urine and blood, as well as prostatic fluid, were negative. My urologist termed it non-bacterial prostatitis. Is he accurate on this?
text: Hello, I am a 33 year old male. I am experiencing discomfort in the perineum and anus, especially when sitting down. Ultrasounds of the prostate, kidney, and bladder were negative. Culture tests on urine and blood, as well as prostatic fluid, were negative. My urologist termed it non-bacterial prostatitis. Is he accurate on this?
